display.purpose: Module titles (h1) and section headings; text-wrap: balance.

body.purpose: All prose at 17px/1.65 on an 820px measure; rem so reading size scales.

label.purpose: Everything that is interface: kickers, chips, keycaps, counts, summaries.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.value: 0 4px 12px color-mix(in srgb, #1c1b1a 8%, transparent), 0 1px 3px color-mix(in srgb, #1c1b1a 6%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Hover response paired with the 1px .sc-lift rise.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: The one easing curve for every transition.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: State changes: color, border, chevron rotation, press/lift.

motion.name: dur
motion.purpose: Surface changes: theme cross-fade, panel reveals.

motion.name: dur-flash
motion.purpose: One-shot deep-link arrival flash (sc-target-flash); zeroed under prefers-reduced-motion like the others.

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square 38px control (theme toggle, search trigger); accent light-up on hover, 1px dip on press.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Bytt tema"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2m0 16v2M4.9 4.9l1.4 1.4m11.4 11.4 1.4 1.4M2 12h2m16 0h2M4.9 19.1l1.4-1.4m11.4-11.4 1.4-1.4"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 38px; height: 38px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dad8ce); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--bg-elevated, #f2f0e5); color: var(--muted, #575653); cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover { color: var(--accent-ink, #35507f); border-color: var(--accent, #205ea6); } .ds-icon-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #205ea6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Labelled Pill
components.description: The bordered control recipe in labelled form: search trigger, done button, hero continue.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dad8ce); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--bg-elevated, #f2f0e5); color: var(--muted, #575653); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.84rem; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-pill:hover { border-color: var(--accent, #205ea6); color: var(--accent-ink, #35507f); } .ds-pill:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #205ea6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Pill chip for filters and formula tags; selected fills solid accent.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4em; padding: 0.35em 0.8em; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cecdc3); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bg-elevated, #f2f0e5); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted, #575653); cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms, background-color 120ms, border-color 120ms; } .ds-chip:hover { color: var(--accent-ink, #35507f); border-color: var(--accent, #205ea6); } .ds-chip[aria-pressed="true"] { background: var(--accent, #205ea6); border-color: var(--accent, #205ea6); color: var(--accent-contrast, #fff); }

components.name: Floating Tile
components.description: Borderless card with whisper shadow; hover grows shadow and lifts 1px.
components.html: 03Interferens og diffraksjon12 formler · 4 eksempler
components.css: .ds-tile { display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--bg-elevated, #f2f0e5); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(28,27,26,0.07); text-decoration: none; color: var(--fg, #100f0f); transition: box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), background-color 120ms, transform 120ms; } .ds-tile:hover:not(:active) { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(28,27,26,0.08), 0 1px 3px rgba(28,27,26,0.06); } .ds-tile-num { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--faint, #6f6e69); } .ds-tile-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.26rem; } .ds-tile-sub { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted, #575653); }

components.name: Disclosure Summary
components.description: The Solution/Hint/Derivation idiom: mono accent summary, rotating chevron, hairline when open.
components.html:
Løsning
Bruk linseformelen 1/f = 1/s + 1/s′ og løs for s′.
components.css: .ds-disclosure { border-radius: 6px; background: var(--card-nested, #e6e4d9); overflow: hidden; } .ds-summary { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--accent-ink, #35507f); cursor: pointer; list-style: none; user-select: none; transition: background-color 120ms; } .ds-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-summary:hover { background: rgba(16,15,15,0.06); } .ds-disclosure[open] > .ds-summary { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #dad8ce); } .ds-chev { display: inline-flex; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-disclosure[open] > .ds-summary .ds-chev { transform: rotate(90deg); } .ds-body { padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Spectral, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--fg, #100f0f); }

components.name: Keycap
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-block; padding: 1px 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted, #575653); border: 1px solid var(--border, #dad8ce); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--card, #f2f0e5); }

narrative.overview: A beautifully set course book whose margins happen to be alive. Print typography carries the entire hierarchy: Fraunces display headings, Spectral body at a generous 17px editorial measure, IBM Plex Mono for every piece of interface marginalia. The surface is Flexoki warm paper in light mode and warm near-black in dark; every neutral is tinted toward the ink. Interaction is quiet marginalia, not app chrome: controls sit restrained at rest and answer every touch.
keyCharacteristics: Warm Flexoki paper/ink palette, per-course accent as the only brand variable
Serif-first: display serif headings, serif body, mono UI labels
Depth is tonal paper layering, not shadow stacking; flat at rest
One interaction vocabulary sitewide (.sc-* primitives); completion is always accent
Norwegian editorial content with server-rendered KaTeX math everywhere

rules.name: The Two-Border Rule
rules.body: Panels use --border; interactive controls use --border-strong. A component that mixes them up is wrong.

rules.name: The Accent-Ink Rule
rules.body: Accent-colored TEXT always goes through --accent-ink (accent mixed 75% toward the ink); raw --accent on text is forbidden except on accent-filled surfaces via --accent-contrast.

rules.name: The Literal-Swatch Rule
rules.body: Aside/callout tones are literal Flexoki -low/-high swatches, never color-mix tints of the accent.

rules.name: The Mono-Marginalia Rule
rules.body: If text is interface, it is IBM Plex Mono. If it is content, it is a serif. No sans ever appears in rendered content.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow growth is a response to hover or overlay, never resting decoration.

dos: Do route every accent-colored text through --accent-ink; keep raw --accent for fills, borders, rings, icons.
Do give every interactive element the full state set: rest, hover, focus-visible, press.
Do use mono for anything that is interface, serif for anything that is content.
Do express depth by stepping paper tones; keep shadows for hover and overlays.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion via the duration tokens.
donts: Don't ship generic docs-site chrome (the Starlight look).

Don't use SaaS/AI-slop tells: gradient text, decorative glassmorphism (the topbar's functional scroll-legibility blur is the single sanctioned exception), hero-metric blocks, identical icon-card grids, side-stripe callout borders.
Don't use pure #000/#fff anywhere; every neutral is a warm Flexoki tone.
Don't mix border roles: panels never use --border-strong, controls never use --border.
Don't tint asides by color-mixing the accent onto paper.
Don't add playful/bouncy motion, confetti, or gamification aesthetics.
Don't put per-course logic or derived colors in the framework.
